spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (direction, getall, getallkeys, getallrecords) and 7 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: There is a try-it button and some script logic, but the interactive surface is minimal (2 form controls) — adding a live readout or more parameters would push it past the bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 9 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5124331450138624 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

runtime_evidence.rationale: The post-fix direct browser sweep loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Keeps load/reseed controls safe while the IndexedDB connection is still initializing. Post-fix validation passed.
